nasb.text: But now having been freed from sin and enslaved to God, you derive your benefit, resulting in sanctification, and the outcome, eternal life.

esv.text: But now that you have been set free from sin and have become slaves of God, the fruit you get leads to sanctification and its end, eternal life.

cnv.text: 現在你們既然從罪裡得了釋放，作了　神的奴僕，就有成聖的果子，那結局就是永生。

ccb.text: 但现在你们已从罪中得到释放，做了上帝的奴仆，这样会使你们圣洁，最终得到永生。

csbs.text: 但如今，你们既从罪中得了释放，成为神的奴仆，就得了果子，以致分别为圣，那结局就是永恒的生命。
